节点.功能描述: LightWeightSet stores a set of values, each of which must be unique.
A constructor used to create a LightWeightSet object.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 10200012 - The LightWeightSet's constructor cannot be directly invoked.

error_codes.description: The LightWeightSet's constructor cannot be directly invoked.

节点.功能描述: Gets the element number of the LightWeightSet.
If the set does not contain the element, the specified element is added
注释信息: @param { T } obj - obj obj Added element
@returns { boolean } the boolean type(Is there contain this element)
@throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The add method cannot be bound.
节点.return_description: the boolean type(Is there contain this element)

error_codes.description: The add method cannot be bound.

节点.功能描述: Ensures that the capacity of an LightWeightSet container is greater than or equal to a specified value, and that the container has all the original objects after capacity expansion 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number } minimumCapacity Minimum capacity to be reserved
@throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The increaseCapacityTo method cannot be bound.

Parameter error. Possible causes:
The value of minimumCapacity is out of range.

节点.功能描述: Executes the given callback function once for each real key in the map. It does not perform functions on deleted keys. callbackFn (required) A function that accepts up to three arguments. The function to be called for each element. thisArg (Optional) The value to be used as this value for when callbackFn is called. If thisArg is omitted, undefined is used as the this value. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
